publishedAbstract: * `ocs-operator` keeps waiting to become the leader in an OCS cluster. * The `ocs-operator` pod is continually logging the following message: ~~~ 2020-08-17T15:03:16.675357877Z {"level":"info","ts":"2020-08-17T15:03:16.675Z","logger":"leader","msg":"Trying to become the leader."} 2020-08-17T15:03:19.69037908Z {"level":"info","ts":"2020-08-17T15:03:19.690Z","logger":"leader","msg":"Found existing lock","LockOwner":"ocs-operator-5d664769f-gx5nl"} 2020-08-17T15:03:19.694839447Z {"level":"info","ts":"2020-08-17T15:03:19.694Z","logger":"leader","msg":"Not the leader. Waiting."} ~~~
publishedTitle: 'ocs-operator' keeps waiting to become the leader in an OCS cluster
